comics.title: the operation was a success, but the operation was ALSO a huge mistake!
comics.alt: and i don't have to tell you this, but when that happens in a matter/antimatter intermix chamber it's not great

comics.title: standing next to your own personal bespoke wario is cool because they honestly make you look GREAT
comics.alt: PRO-TIP: you don't need an app to remind you to take a break and drink some water when your computer's vacuum tubes burn out 15 times a day instead.  just drink then.  easy

comics.title: batman cheat codes for real life
comics.alt: given the small size of our field we're also the worst there is at what we do, but we like to focus on the positive

comics.title: pop quiz is short for a) popular quiz, b) soda pop quiz, or c) discopop quiz
comics.alt: how often are you getting pizza pie thrown into your eyes, dean?  dean.  dean i just wanna know why you assumed that was a universal experience

comics.title: t-rex is just SO HAPPY in that last panel
comics.alt: AND it's the perfect socially-acceptable excuse to cram ice cream sandwiches into your mouth as quickly as possible.

comics.title: this comic is 10% better if you don't know Shakespeare wrote Julius Caesar, so in the last panel it's just T-Rex carrying a heck of a grudge against the guy
comics.alt: friends, romans, third type of guy: lend me your ears

comics.title: i wrote this comic a few days ago and then yesterday i saw a turtle!!  it's like i MANIFESTED it.  only she wasn't wearing a hamburger costume so it's like i manifested NOTHING
comics.alt: sherlock put on a hamburger costume and deduced it felt all wrong for him.  he was a polish sausage costume guy or he was NOTHING

comics.title: art is life
comics.alt: i'll consider art when i'm dead, and since i'm gonna be dead for a LOT longer than i'm alive, living is for filling up that art-consideration tank. to answer your question: no i am NOT interested in discussing my unusual theology any further

comics.title: non-candle-based lights, today known as "lights"
comics.alt: ...wait, when the power goes out i DO search my cupboards for horses.  am i not supposed to

comics.title: t-rex's movie mashup minute
comics.alt: whenever a character in a movie looks through binoculars they should see that old-timey silent film train racing towards them, and THEN, according to KULESHOV, when they lower their binoculars we'll all get to see a reaction to that train.  filmic art, baby
